use: Justifies trade openness, public debt, level of development and the Polish liquidity or credit-constraint extension.

Candidate specifications are compared on the same h8 observation universe where feasible. The model-averaging papers remain model-uncertainty context, not direct support for this fixed-sample rule.
Regression diagnostic hygiene: full rank, condition number and collinearity checks.
Justifies common-support or overlap checks before using Poland's feature profile.
Justifies country-level resampling and delete-one-country checks. This public reproduction block uses these draws only as finite-run reproducibility checks, not as sign filters.
Justifies uncertainty and robustness checks across horizons and samples. This public reproduction block uses time blocks only as finite-run reproducibility checks, not as sign filters.
The gate deliberately excludes K_Y>0, K_G>0 and positive-sign stability of kernels. Subsequent numerical points use the selected specifications separately.
